summary: Docker build failed due to HTTP 502 error when downloading nydus from GitHub releases, followed by cascading network timeouts and context cancellations during image fetches.
root_cause: wget command received HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway error from GitHub when downloading nydus release artifact; followed by context canceled errors during image blob fetches from Quay.io and CDN, indicating transient network availability issues upstream.

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Direct indication of HTTP 502 error when attempting to download from GitHub, the primary build failure.

evidence.quote: ERROR: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: buildx bake error showing wget process failed with exit code 1 due to the 502 error.

evidence.quote: error="failed to do request: Get \"https://cdn01.quay.io/...\" context canceled"
evidence.reason: Evidence of context cancellation during image blob fetch, indicating cascading network/timeout issues.

evidence.quote: error="failed to do request: Get \"https://quay.io/v2/minio/minio/blobs/sha256:...\": context canceled"
evidence.reason: Additional context canceled error during image pull from Quay.io, reinforcing network availability issues.

evidence.quote: level=error msg="/moby.buildkit.v1.Control/Solve returned error: rpc error: code = Canceled desc = context canceled"
evidence.reason: buildkit RPC error showing context cancellation, likely due to upstream network failures.

suggested_fix: Retry the CI job. The HTTP 502 and context cancellations indicate transient network issues with GitHub and image registries that should resolve on retry. Monitor GitHub and registry status if failures persist.
